decision.improvement_guardrail: Preserve source truth and requested fidelity while improving UX, accessibility, responsiveness, states, and polish.

tool_selection_explanation.source_material_reason: Input is treated as url for primary_website_evidence_or_style_reference.
tool_selection_explanation.build_scope_reason: Build scope is component because the detected/requested UI scope maps to that Magic project type.
tool_selection_explanation.magic_project_type_reason: Use Magic component to avoid generating the wrong UI surface.
tool_selection_explanation.magic_creation_type_reason: Use get_inspired; from_scratch means no URL flow, get_inspired means URL-derived evidence or inspiration.
tool_selection_explanation.website_goal_reason: Use drive_sales to pick the right conversion/workflow pattern.
tool_selection_explanation.ui_ux_pro_max_mode_reason: UI/UX Pro Max must improve the UI beyond the source while respecting fidelity and source truth.
tool_selection_explanation.motion_intensity_reason: Use standard motion after UI rebuild only, with purpose and reduced-motion fallback.
tool_selection_explanation.qa_gate_reason: Design quality, visual parity, accessibility, responsiveness, and motion purpose gates must approve the output.

component_pattern_selection.name: drive_sales
component_pattern_selection.reason: Best fit for product discovery and purchase conversion.

motion_plan.bundle_policy: Prefer LazyMotion and motion/react-m; load domMax only when layout/drag is required.

animations.purpose: Improve orientation and perceived polish for the selected pattern.
animations.qa_assertion: Animation does not delay primary task or hide content.
